headline: Meta Reports Q1 Earnings Tomorrow: 3 Things to Watch on AI Spend
summary: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) reports Q1 2026 earnings on Wednesday, April 29, after market close. Management has guided Q1 revenue to $53.5 billion to $56.5 billion, embedding what CFO Susan Li called an outlook for accelerated growth. Shares trade around $675, up 29% over the past month and 3% year to date. The stock now carries ... Meta Reports Q1 Earnings Tomorrow: 3 Things to Watch on AI Spend
